name: PriceChart

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: Messages used for the price chart implementation.

aliases.name: Model
aliases.type: { prices : PriceHistory, focus : Maybe Focus, startDate : Date, interval : Interval, candlestickWidth : Float, candlestickPadding : Float, position : Position, drag : State String }

values.name: priceChart
values.comment:
Render a price chart. This returns an SVG element but not entire SVG; you
need to embed this into an SVG.

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: Subscriptions needed for full price-chart functionality (e.g. draggability).

name: PriceChart.Types

aliases.name: ElementRect
aliases.comment: The bounding rect of a DOM element
aliases.type: { left : Float, right : Float, top : Float, bottom : Float }

aliases.name: PriceAction
aliases.comment: The stats for a price's action over some span of time.
aliases.type: { startDate : Date, endDate : Date, close : Price, volume : Float, open : Price, high : Price, low : Price }

aliases.name: PriceHistory
aliases.comment: A sequence of price actions, assumed to be in order from most recent to oldest.

values.name: actionsByDate
values.comment: Retrieve PriceActions from a history that cover a certain date.

values.name: maxPrice
values.comment: Get the hightest price in a history.

values.name: mergeActions
values.comment:
Merge two PriceActions into a single PriceAction that represents the full
interval of both.

values.name: mergeHistory
values.comment: Merge all actions in a history into a single action

values.name: minPrice
values.comment: Get the lowest price in a history.
